fixtures.description: Simple native SegWit wallet with labeled exchange and change UTXOs.
Wallet with more than one receive to the same external address.
Wallet shape with many small UTXOs that become uneconomical under higher fee rates.
Wallet containing Exchange, P2P, Donation, Change, and Unknown source categories.
Wallet containing a legacy P2PKH-style UTXO with higher spend-cost assumptions.
Wallet containing a tiny unlabeled unknown-source UTXO for dust-attack suspicion checks.
